testcase.name: test_public_link_custom_answers_modes
testcase.failure: tests/test_casting_review_live.py:374: in test_public_link_custom_answers_modes link_one = _make_link( tests/test_casting_review_live.py:272: in _make_link assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"bool_type","loc":["body","field_visibility","custom_answers"],"msg":"Input should be a valid boolean","input":{"Passport?":false,"Bike?":true},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/bool_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
